page_content:
Prerequisite: ARTT200, ARTT210, and ARTT150; or permission of ARHU- Art department.

ARTT355 Intermediate Graphic Design Principles (3 Credits) Investigation of basic concepts, history, techniques, and materials used by professional graphic designers, focusing on typography. Explores various aspects of design related to typography through examination and production of many types of finished work.

Prerequisite: ARTT150, ARTT200, ARTT210, and ARTT255; and must be admitted to the Graphic Design Concentration (Track 3).
